problem id: 35364e9a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR NOT SHR(5)

examples:
  00011101 -> 11111111
  10111100 -> 11111111
  00110101 -> 11111111
  10010011 -> 11111111
  10010101 -> 11111111
  11101000 -> 11111010
  01001110 -> 11111111
  01001000 -> 11111111
  01111110 -> 11111111

query: 01111001
predicted answer: 11111110
